entries.name: sendDeleteAccountVerification
entries.description:
When `true`, matches server `sendDeleteAccountVerification`: deletion starts by sending a
verification email instead of deleting immediately in this request.

entries.name: localization
entries.description: Override the plugin's default localization strings.
entries.type: Partial<{ deleteAccount: string; deleteAccountDescription: string; deleteUserVerificationSent: string; deleteUserSuccess: string; }>
